name: The Revenge
original_name: รอยรักรอยบาป
overview: Raya who comes from an aristocratic family was married to womanizer Phraya Wisut. She seems to be a saint who is kind and giving but is actually evil and merciless. When she finds a new girl who has caught the attention of her husband, she plans to get rid of the other wife, Juan, who was born as a slave in Wisut house.

trailers.title: ความรัก ความใคร่ ความหลงใหล และความแค้น | รอยรักรอยบาป [Official Trailer]
